39: 
40: // ValkeyStore implements Store interface using Valkey
41: type ValkeyStore struct {
42: 	client valkey.Client
43: }
44: 
45: // NewValkeyStore creates a new Valkey store
46: func NewValkeyStore() (*ValkeyStore, error) {
47: 	addr := os.Getenv("VALKEY_ADDR")
48: 	if addr == "" {
49: 		addr = os.Getenv("REDIS_ADDR")
50: 	}
51: 	if addr == "" {
52: 		return nil, errors.New("VALKEY_ADDR or REDIS_ADDR environment variable is not set")
53: 	}
54: 
55: 	password := os.Getenv("VALKEY_PASSWORD")
56: 	if password == "" {
57: 		password = os.Getenv("REDIS_PASSWORD")
58: 	}
59: 
60: 	client, err := valkey.NewClient(valkey.ClientOption{
61: 		InitAddress: []string{addr},
62: 		Password:    password,
63: 	})
64: 	if err != nil {
65: 		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to create valkey client: %w", err)
66: 	}
67: 
68: 	return &ValkeyStore{client: client}, nil
69: }
70: 
71: func (v *ValkeyStore) Ping(ctx context.Context) error {
72: 	return v.client.Do(ctx, v.client.B().Ping().Build()).Error()
73: }
74: 
75: func (v *ValkeyStore) GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
76: 	key := valkeySessionKeyPrefix + sessionID
77: 	data, err := v.client.Do(ctx, v.client.B().Get().Key(key).Build()).ToString()
78: 	if err != nil {
79: 		if strings.Contains(err.Error(), "nil") {
80: 			return nil, ErrNotFound
81: 		}
82: 		return nil, err
83: 	}
84: 
85: 	var sandbox types.SandboxInfo
86: 	if err := json.Unmarshal([]byte(data), &sandbox); err != nil {
87: 		return nil, err
88: 	}
89: 	return &sandbox, nil
90: }
91: 
92: func (v *ValkeyStore) StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error {
93: 	if sandbox == nil {
94: 		return errors.New("sandbox is nil")
95: 	}
96: 	if sandbox.ExpiresAt.IsZero() {
97: 		return errors.New("expiresAt is required")
98: 	}
99: 
100: 	key := valkeySessionKeyPrefix + sandbox.SessionID
101: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandbox)
102: 	if err != nil {
103: 		return err
104: 	}
105: 
106: 	// Use transaction for atomic operations
107: 	commands := []valkey.Completed{
108: 		v.client.B().Set().Key(key).Value(string(data)).Build(),
109: 		v.client.B().Zadd().Key(valkeySessionExpiryKey).ScoreMember().
110: 			ScoreMember(float64(sandbox.ExpiresAt.Unix()), sandbox.SessionID).Build(),
111: 		v.client.B().Zadd().Key(valkeySessionLastActivityKey).ScoreMember().
112: 			ScoreMember(float64(time.Now().Unix()), sandbox.SessionID).Build(),
113: 	}
114: 
115: 	for _, cmd := range commands {
116: 		if err := v.client.Do(ctx, cmd).Error(); err != nil {
117: 			return err
118: 		}
119: 	}
120: 
121: 	return nil
122: }
123: 
124: func (v *ValkeyStore) UpdateSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error {
125: 	if sandbox == nil {
126: 		return errors.New("sandbox is nil")
127: 	}
128: 
129: 	key := valkeySessionKeyPrefix + sandbox.SessionID
130: 	exists, err := v.client.Do(ctx, v.client.B().Exists().Key(key).Build()).AsBool()
131: 	if err != nil {
132: 		return err
133: 	}
134: 	if !exists {
135: 		return errors.New("key not exists")
136: 	}
137: 
138: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandbox)
139: 	if err != nil {
140: 		return err
141: 	}
142: 
143: 	return v.client.Do(ctx, v.client.B().Set().Key(key).Value(string(data)).Build()).Error()
144: }
145: 
146: func (v *ValkeyStore) DeleteSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) error {
147: 	key := valkeySessionKeyPrefix + sessionID
148: 
149: 	commands := []valkey.Completed{
150: 		v.client.B().Del().Key(key).Build(),
151: 		v.client.B().Zrem().Key(valkeySessionExpiryKey).Member(sessionID).Build(),
152: 		v.client.B().Zrem().Key(valkeySessionLastActivityKey).Member(sessionID).Build(),
153: 	}
154: 
155: 	for _, cmd := range commands {
156: 		if err := v.client.Do(ctx, cmd).Error(); err != nil {
157: 			return err
158: 		}
159: 	}
160: 
161: 	return nil
162: }
163: 
164: func (v *ValkeyStore) ListExpiredSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
165: 	return v.listSandboxesByScore(ctx, valkeySessionExpiryKey, 0, before.Unix(), limit)
166: }
167: 
168: func (v *ValkeyStore) ListInactiveSandboxes(ctx context.Context, before time.Time, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
169: 	return v.listSandboxesByScore(ctx, valkeySessionLastActivityKey, 0, before.Unix(), limit)
170: }
171: 
172: func (v *ValkeyStore) listSandboxesByScore(ctx context.Context, key string, min, max int64, limit int64) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
173: 	ids, err := v.client.Do(ctx, v.client.B().Zrangebyscore().Key(key).Min(fmt.Sprintf("%d", min)).Max(fmt.Sprintf("%d", max)).
174: 		Limit(0, limit).Build()).AsStrSlice()
175: 	if err != nil {
176: 		return nil, err
177: 	}
178: 
179: 	return v.loadSandboxesBySessionIDs(ctx, ids)
180: }
181: 
182: func (v *ValkeyStore) loadSandboxesBySessionIDs(ctx context.Context, ids []string) ([]*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
183: 	if len(ids) == 0 {
184: 		return nil, nil
185: 	}
186: 
187: 	sandboxes := make([]*types.SandboxInfo, 0, len(ids))
188: 	for _, id := range ids {
189: 		sandbox, err := v.GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx, id)
190: 		if err != nil {
191: 			klog.Warningf("Failed to get sandbox %s: %v", id, err)
192: 			continue
193: 		}
194: 		sandboxes = append(sandboxes, sandbox)
195: 	}
196: 
197: 	return sandboxes, nil
198: }
199: 
200: func (v *ValkeyStore) UpdateSessionLastActivity(ctx context.Context, sessionID string, at time.Time) error {
201: 	if sessionID == "" {
202: 		return errors.New("sessionID is required")
203: 	}
204: 
205: 	if at.IsZero() {
206: 		at = time.Now()
207: 	}
208: 
209: 	// Verify session exists
210: 	key := valkeySessionKeyPrefix + sessionID
211: 	exists, err := v.client.Do(ctx, v.client.B().Exists().Key(key).Build()).AsBool()
212: 	if err != nil {
213: 		return err
214: 	}
215: 	if !exists {
216: 		return ErrNotFound
217: 	}
218: 
219: 	return v.client.Do(ctx, v.client.B().Zadd().Key(valkeySessionLastActivityKey).ScoreMember().
220: 		ScoreMember(float64(at.Unix()), sessionID).Build()).Error()
221: }
222: 
223: func (v *ValkeyStore) Close() error {
224: 	v.client.Close()
225: 	return nil
226: }
